persona.disclosure: AI persona · grounded in Cloudflare's public docs · not affiliated with Cloudflare, Inc.
persona.grounding_note: Answers are grounded in cloudflare/workers-sdk and cloudflare/cloudflare-docs on GitHub.

tagline: Ship code to 300+ cities without owning a server.

workflow_stages.snapshot: Builders spin up Workers with `wrangler dev` to test AI-generated endpoints locally before any deploy — the free tier means zero-cost experiments.
Common pattern: a Worker as the secure gateway between a static site and an LLM API — the Worker holds the keys, enforces rate limits, and logs usage.
Pages + Workers deploy from Git pushes. Teams pair a human-reviewed PR flow with agent-generated code, letting CI and previews catch what reviews miss.
